rationale: Hard pass as-is: the hook is a live-action POV skit explicitly name-dropping a Tetris-style block puzzle, which clashes with Solitaire's core stacking/sorting loop and the classic green-felt 2D aesthetic — neither the purple/gold/cyan palette nor the youthful backflip energy aligns with the adult casual card audience. The archetype also has razor-thin support (n=1, single advertiser), so freshness/velocity signals are unreliable. Only worth testing if reshot for Solitaire with an age-appropriate actor, swapped overlay ("opened Solitaire"), and a gameplay payoff showing card foundation builds — otherwise skip.
